script: echo '===== Linux user accounts on the VM =====' && getent passwd | awk -F: '$3 >= 1000 && $3 < 65000 {print $1, $3, $6, $7}'; echo; echo '===== Heather bot service unit (User=, ExecStart, paths) =====' && systemctl cat heather-bot.service heather-responder.service 2>&1 | grep -E 'User|Group|ExecStart|WorkingDirectory|Environment' | head -20; echo; echo '===== /home/heather contents =====' && sudo ls -la /home/heather/ 2>&1 | head -25; echo; echo '===== Files in heather home matching bot/responder =====' && sudo ls -la /home/heather/heather-*.py /home/heather/heather-*.sh 2>&1 | head -10; echo; echo '===== Heather has its own claude CLI? =====' && sudo ls -la /home/heather/.npm-global/bin/claude 2>&1 | head -3; echo; echo '===== Compare: Cameron (new bot, /home/azureuser/) =====' && systemctl cat cameron-bot.service cameron-responder.service 2>&1 | grep -E 'User|Group|ExecStart|WorkingDirectory' | head -10; echo; echo '===== sudoers/permissions setup for heather user =====' && sudo cat /etc/sudoers.d/heather 2>/dev/null || echo '  (no sudoers entry)'; echo; echo '===== Heather permissions on shared directories =====' && stat -c '%U:%G %a %n' /home/heather /home/heather/.npm-global 2>/dev/null
